features: HG Leather Cleaner: Cleans, nourishes, protects and enhances leather furniture, seating and accessories. 4-in-1 leather cleaning solution also strengthens the colour and structure of the leather
Leather Cleaner for Sofas: Leather protector for all areas of the home. A leather cleaner for car seats, briefcases, shoes, settees, chairs or foot stools. Safe and gentle on all types of leather
Keep Leather in Top Condition: Simply add a cloth for an easy to use leather cleaning kit for sofas, bags, leather jackets and upholstery. Ideal for cleaning and adding a protective, anti-stain layer
Colour Enhancer: The colour and structure of the leather are enriched, making it look brand new again. Ensures it remains supple and fully protected against dirt, stains and perspiration
Easy to Use: Apply with a cloth or sponge and gently rub it into the material to treat leather. After about 10 minutes polish with a soft cloth. Part of the range of outstanding HG cleaning products
description: Product Description HG 4-in-1 Leather Cleaner cleans, nourishes, protects and maintains leather furniture and accessories, for leather reconditioning. The leather cleaner and conditioner helps surfaces to remain supple and fully protected against dirt, stains and perspiration. The protective cleaner for leather also strengthens the colour and structure, leaving it beautifully clean, shiny and polished after just one treatment. Leather is a natural product and can dry out, so good leather reconditioning is essential. This water-based leather protector and furniture polish is developed specially for looking after full aniline and scumbled types of leather on furniture, suitcases, belts, car seats, shoes and bags. After treatment, the leather will no longer attract dirt, leaving it protected from stains, rain and water marks. Includes: 1 x HG 4-in-1 Leather Cleaner (250ml bottle). How to use HG Leather Cleaner: 1. Use a cloth or sponge to gently rub it into the material. 2. After about 10 minutes polish with a soft cloth, without using any pressure, for perfectly cleaned and nourished leather. Always read the label before use. Test HG cleaning products on a discrete area first. Keep out of reach of children. Discover HG’s wide range of specialist cleaning products for your home, office and outside space. Ingredients 1,2-benzisothiazol-3(2H)-one; 1,2-benzisothiazolin-3-one (2634-33-5) (00178), 2-methylisothiazol-3(2H)-one (2682-20-4) (00180). May produce an allergic reaction Box Contains 1 x HG 4 in 1 for Leather 0.25L See more
